§6Neutrino Lens§f

§aX-ray vision for your helmet — detect valuable blocks, ores, oil, and treasures through solid walls!§f

The §bNeutrino Lens§f is a craftable armor modification that functions like an X-ray, highlighting valuable blocks as block-shaped markers through solid walls. It must be linked to a §bDepth-Resource Scanning Module Satellite§f and installed in an armor helmet via the §bArmor Modification Table§f. Activate the HUD key to see the highlighted blocks.

§6Crafting§f (Crafting Table):
§b• §e2×§f Polymer Bar
§b• §e3×§f Starmetal Ingot
§b• §e1×§f Versatile Circuit Board

§6Detectable Blocks§f:
§b•§f Bedrock Ores
§b•§f Oil and Bedrock Oil
§b•§f Coltan Ore and Alexandrite
§b•§f Bobbleheads (shows as §6A Treasure!§f)
§b•§f Conserve Crates and Starmetal Crates
§b•§f Loot Piles
§b•§f Pink Logs
§b•§f Schist and Australium Ore
§b•§f End Portal Frames
§b•§f Volcano Core

§6Probability§f:
Some blocks (Coltan Ore, Oil, Bedrock Oil, Australium Ore, Schist) have only a certain chance to be rendered to reduce screen clutter.

§eTip§f: The Neutrino Lens is primarily useful for locating §bbedrock oil§f and §bbedrock ore veins§f without needing to walk around with a Survey Scanner. Combine with the Depth-Resource Satellite for maximum coverage!
